history.text: Al Khalifa dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Declared independence marked a key step in Bahrain's path toward modern sovereignty.
Bahrain became independent from United Kingdom, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The Kingdom of Bahrain emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
